_comment: Example --config for tools/idea_scout.py. Without --config the tool uses its baked-in DEFAULT_TOPICS (this same shape) and DEFAULTS thresholds. Provide `topics` to REPLACE the topic set, `thresholds` to override any subset of the numeric knobs. Each topic: `key` (stable id, also the dedup/score group), `arxiv` (arXiv API query language: all:/ti:/abs: + AND/OR; omit to skip arXiv), `github` (gh search repos query; omit to skip GitHub), `terms` (relevance terms scored in title>abstract), `area` (an EXISTING repo label or it is dropped).

topics.arxiv: abs:"prompt injection" AND (abs:agent OR abs:LLM OR abs:tool)
(abs:"KV cache" OR abs:"prefix cache") AND (abs:reuse OR abs:inference)
